LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT TIG INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS HEARD TODAY. ARGUMENT WAS HEARD ON THE ISSUE REGARDING INDEMNITY AGREEMENT, PARAGRAPH 5. THE COURT RULED THAT INDEMNITY AGREEMENT ON THE RENTAL AGREEMENT DOES APPLY TO THE ACCIDENT IN SAN MATEO. DUE TO FAMILY COMITTMENT OF ATTORNEY REMMEL AND PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES, THE COURT CONTINUED THIS MOTION FROM JUNE 27, 2006 TO 6/29/06 AT 2:00 PM. JUDGE: HAROLD E.
